subtitle: How it works
title: From first conversation to live website.

steps.title: We start by understanding your business
steps.subtitle: step 01
body: Every great website starts with a great conversation. In our discovery call, we take the time to understand your business, your audience, your goals, and what success looks like for you. No templates, no assumptions — just listening.

We'll ask about your brand, your competitors, and what you need your website to do. By the end of this call, we'll have everything we need to put together a clear proposal and project plan tailored specifically to you.

steps.title: We design your site before writing a single line of code
steps.subtitle: step 02
body: Before development begins, our designers create detailed mockups of your website. You'll see exactly how every page will look and feel, giving you the opportunity to review, provide feedback, and refine the design before anything is built.
This stage ensures there are no surprises during development. We agree on the design together, then move forward with complete confidence. Your input shapes everything.

steps.title: We build your website with clean, quality code
steps.subtitle: step 03
body: Once the design is approved, our developers get to work. We build everything to agreed specifications — responsive, fast, and accessible. You'll have access to a staging environment throughout so you can track progress and flag anything at any time.
We integrate your CMS, connect your tools, and test thoroughly across devices and browsers. Nothing goes live until it meets our quality standards and has your sign-off.

steps.title: We launch your site and stick around to support you
steps.subtitle: step 04
body: Launch day is the beginning, not the end. We handle the technical side of going live — domain setup, SSL, redirects, and final checks — so everything goes smoothly without any stress on your end.

After launch, you'll have 30 days of included support to catch and fix anything that comes up. And if you want ongoing maintenance, performance monitoring, or future development, we offer flexible support plans to keep your website in top shape.
